description_long: This is a medium-sized dog with a lean, athletic build and a short, smooth coat. Its fur is predominantly white with large patches of brown and black, especially along the back, sides, and head. The head is elongated with a straight muzzle, and the ears are long, floppy, and hang down close to the cheeks. The tail is straight and carried low, following the line of the back. The legs are slender and well-proportioned, giving the dog a poised and alert stance. There is no visible collar or leash, and the dog appears to be a Beagle, a breed known for its tricolor pattern and distinctive features.
description: A medium-sized, tricolored dog with a lean build, floppy ears, and a straight, low tail. Its coat is short and smooth, with white, brown, and black patches.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dog's elongated body, tricolor coat, and floppy ears.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dog's straight muzzle, symmetrical face, and forward-facing floppy ears.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same tricolor pattern and the dog's alert stance.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the straight tail, hind legs, and the distribution of color along the back.
